query:
-- Step 1: Flip letter+number (e.g. "A1", "B4", "D3") → number+letter (e.g. "1A", "4B", "3D")
-- Matches exactly: one letter A-E followed by 1-2 digits, nothing else
UPDATE order_tracking
SET outboundLocation = CONCAT(
  REGEXP_SUBSTR(outboundLocation, '[0-9]+'),
  REGEXP_SUBSTR(outboundLocation, '^[A-E]')
)
WHERE outboundLocation REGEXP '^[A-E][0-9]{1,2}$';
command:

-- Matches exactly: one letter A-E followed by 1-2 digits, nothing else
UPDATE order_tracking
SET outboundLocation = CONCAT(
  REGEXP_SUBSTR(outboundLocation, '[0-9]+'),
  REGEXP_SUBSTR(outboundLocation, '^[A-E]')
